privileged_info_summary: The task is a synthetic configuration exercise where the agent must create a new hospital ward and two beds. The expected ward name ('Airborne Infection Isolation Ward') and bed names ('AIIR-01' and 'AIIR-02') exactly match the explicit instructions in the task description and are verified by the SQL queries in export_result.sh.
